title: The Art Of Touch A Journey Into Massage
company: Jing Institute of Massage and Complementary Medicine
description: Step away from the rush of everyday life and immerse yourself in The Art of Touch, a blissful Brighton Fringe workshop celebrating the beauty of connection and the craft of massage. Guided by the renowned Jing Institute, you’ll spend three restorative hours discovering the principles of professional massage in a warm, nurturing space. Give and receive deeply soothing treatments while learning effective, hands-on techniques you can use straight away. More than relaxation, this is an invitation to explore a new path, whether you’re curious or considering a career in massage therapy, it’s the perfect introduction to the skills, philosophy, and joy of holistic touch. Under the expert guidance of Jing Directors Rachel Fairweather and Meghan Mari, you’ll be supported every step of the way. Come alone or with a friend; everyone is welcome. Leave feeling inspired, grounded, and gently transformed, a few radiant hours that could spark a whole new journey.
content_warnings: This is a professional massage workshop where participants will have the option to remove clothing for their turn on the massage table
